title.en: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36
title.zh: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36
title.th: 2 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36

summary.th: ขาย: 2 นอน 49 ตร.ม. ราคา 9,377,000 บาท (DotProperty #ded663a5578b-2280-6c82-63f6-4aeb5089)

description.en:
Live close to BTS Thong Lo in a stylish 2-bedroom condo that feels refined, functional, and move-in ready.
This unit at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36 is designed for buyers who want a prime Sukhumvit address with a smarter layout, city view, and elevated everyday comfort.
Why This Unit Stands Out

2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, 48.85 sqm of well-planned living space
11th floor city view with natural light and a more private feel
Modern contemporary interior with premium finishing, wood tones, and wood panel details
Ambient lighting in the bedrooms and living area for a warmer, more relaxing atmosphere
Balcony, bathtub, kitchen, carpet details, Fiber Optic internet, and pre-installed WiFi
Well maintained and move-in ready, saving time before occupancy or rental use

Property Details

Project: Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36
Size: 48.85 sqm
Bedrooms: 2 | Bathroom: 1
Floor: 11 | View: City View

Ideal forPerfect for urban professionals, couples, executives, expats, and investors looking for a 2-bedroom Bangkok condo near BTS Thong Lo in a high-demand Sukhumvit rental zone.
Approx. Nearby Locations

BTS Thong Lo: 380–450m
Rain Hill: 900m
Bangkok Planetarium: 1.1km
Gateway Ekamai: 1.3km
Emporium / EmQuartier: 1.5–1

title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36

summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 46 ตร.ม. ราคา 7,850,000 บาท (DotProperty #6bd6593ba8f5-8731-2762-8c77-3cdcc089)

description.en:
Live above the city in a residence that instantly feels rare, private, and elevated at Ideo Q Sukhumvit 36 — one of the most desirable addresses near Thong Lo.
This 1-bedroom corner unit on the 34th floor offers 45.56 sqm of intelligently designed space, where every detail works together to create both comfort and visual impact. The moment you step in, the floor-to-ceiling windows draw your attention outward — framing a panoramic skyline view that transforms from bright city energy by day to glowing skyline at night.
WHY THIS UNIT FEELS DIFFERENTThis is not just another 1-bedroom — it’s a high-floor corner unit with real lifestyle value

Corner position → more privacy, better airflow, quieter living
34th floor height → unblocked skyline views, no visual clutter
Natural light throughout the day → brighter, more open atmosphere
Balanced layout → practical for real living, not just aesthetics

WHO THIS IS PERFECT FOR

Professionals working in Sukhumvit / Thong Lo
Expats seeking a premium yet practical city base
Investors targeting high-demand rental zones
Buyers who value view, privacy, and long-term value

LIVING EXPERIENCE

Open-plan living area connects seamlessly to a private balc

- Free shuttle to BTS Thonglor
- Thonglor - Rama 4 lifestyle.
